title: Lead Instructional Designer at NIIT Foundation

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at NIIT Foundation
jsonLd.description:
Join the NIIT Foundation family as a Instructional Designer in Delhi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NIIT Foundation:
NIIT Foundation is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Foundation!
